title: Model Comparison — Same Prompt Across All Video Models
description: Generate the same scene with every available t2v model to compare quality, speed, and style.

scenes.name: compare_kling_v3
scenes.prompt: Cinematic close-up of a server rack in a dimly lit room. Blue LED lights reflect off polished metal surfaces. A hand reaches in and plugs an ethernet cable into a port with a satisfying click. Green status LEDs illuminate one by one. Shallow depth of field, professional lighting, 4K quality.
